title: Department Manager Vacancy at Khadim's - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Khadim's - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Khadim's! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Khadim's:
Khadim's is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khadim's!
